# Intake Questions

Ask only what blocks routing or safe execution.

## Minimal Questions

- What artifact should I work from: codebase, URL, screenshot, Figma frame, or brief?
- Is this a product app surface, marketing/public page, audit, critique, or skill-system task?
- Is the material private/local-only, public, or approved for external services?
- What is the target action or user role?
- Do you want implementation, audit findings, a task plan, or validation evidence?
- If this is Figma work, do you want read-only context, design-to-code, code-to-canvas, canvas editing, design-system sync, asset export, or effects?
- If this is a reveal effect, do you already have aligned base/reveal images?

## Do Not Ask When Inferable

- Do not ask whether dashboards are webapp work.
- Do not ask whether landing/product pages are marketing-site work.
- Do not ask for cloud approval unless a cloud path is actually useful.
- Do not ask for Figma write approval for read-only context or critique.
